input_roles.character_image: Locks face, hair, skin tone, body proportion, pose and composition.
input_roles.costume_reference_image: Provides garment cut, fabric, color, accessories and layers.

change_scope: fit clothing naturally to body shape with physical folds, drape, occlusion and motion tension
critical_requirements: Fully restore garment cut, fabric, color, decoration, buttons, embroidery, belt, accessories and layers from costume_reference_image.
Do not copy the model face or body from costume_reference_image.
Do not change background unless explicitly requested.
negative_constraints: do not change character face, hair, body proportion or pose
do not copy face or body from costume reference
do not change background unless requested
do not lose key costume decoration or layers

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Preserve the character from character_image and replace only the clothing with the costume from costume_reference_image, fitting it naturally to the body and pose. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
